title: Isekai Henkyou Meshi
titleNative: 異世界辺境メシ
synopsis: A lone diner stands in the remote frontier. Drawn by the cooking of a human known only as “Master,” demons, elves, and others of all races gather to savor his food. On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

Not being able to sought out the meaning behind the power of his eyes, he becomes discouraged and loses all hope. While then, on the school rooftop he meets a boy, Hibiki Tokisaka, and gets his own heart grasped by the sound of his saxophone!! Kamine who became interested with Hibiki, goes and visits the brass band's concert. There, Kamine witnesses Hibiki's performance shaking up and gripping the people's hearts. Hibiki, who had overcome what Kamine thought could never happen and not possible for him to even do, Kamine approaches him to talk about it, but to find out Hibiki too carry a dark past he cannot tell others. Kamine finds out his secret and he...

titleRomaji: Tetsunabe no Jan! R: Choujou Sakusen
titleNative: 鉄鍋のジャン!R 頂上作戦
synopsis: This year in major international competition of Chinese cuisine, the presumed winners are assured of victory. Indeed, a major sponsor is behind them. These are the ultra-powerful and ultra-wealthy 13 dragons, mostly linked to the Mafia. About this competition which is of prime importance, they control the judges, and put pressure on some competitors worrisome. However it was not counting on the arrival of a cook who fears no pressure. Known in the culinary world for his pranks and his eccentricity, he was once involved in the murder by poisoning. After disappearing for years in China, where nobody knew what he was doing, Jan is back!

Not only does he meet beautiful girls in his busy school life, he even goes as far as living with them under the same roof! Surrounded by these flags, this enviable romantic comedy begins!

And then after an accident, he time-leaps back to his high school days. He tries to find her and make her fall in love with him again, but when he meets her, he finds out that she has a twin sister…!? (Source: Comic Trail, translated)

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)
searchTerms: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ

Traveling Tetsuya chooses to spend his time at Mahjong parlors where he is wiping the floor clean with his adversaries. However, Tetsuya meets the intensely-skilled Boushu-san, this is when he realizes that his skills are still lacking. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Wakaba Won’t Give Up!
titleNative: 若葉ちゃんはわからせたい！
synonyms: Wakaba-chan Wants to Make It Clear
synopsis: Wakaba is cocky, condescending, foul-mouthed, and absolutely in love with her childhood friend, Daiki. For as long as they’ve known each other, Wakaba’s been the very image of a roughhousing tomboy, but all that’s about to change. When she shows up in front of him, wearing a cutesy, feminine outfit, will she get the hopeless late bloomer’s heart racing? When you can’t put your feelings into words, an image change might just be the right gambit! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleRomaji: Soubi Seisaku Kei Cheat de Isekai wo Jiyuu ni Ikite Ikimasu
titleEnglish: Live Freely in Another World With an Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
titleNative: 装備製作系チートで異世界を自由に生きていきます
synonyms: Sobi Seisaku Kei Chi to De Isekai Wo Jiyu Ni Ikiteikimasu
I Will Live Freely in Another World With Equipment Manufacturing Cheat
synopsis: 29-year-old Toji, a job-hopping part-time worker, got caught up in someone else getting summoned to another world. Declared a troublemaker on arrival and thrown out of the castle, he was just about to lose all hope when a status screen from an online game he used to play popped up in front of his eyes. Amazingly, Toji can use that incredibly convenient game mechanic in this new world, and he's the only one! Upgrading weapons, summoning adorable monsters... Armed with all the knowledge and wit he can muster, Toji is free to venture wherever he pleases! (Source: Alpha Manga)
